args: const path = require('node:path'); const { pathToFileURL } = require('node:url'); const root = process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT || process.cwd(); import(pathToFileURL(path.join(root, 'scripts', 'stitch-mcp-remote.mjs')).href).then(({ main }) => main()).catch((error) => { console.error(error.message); process.exit(1); });
